text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 28 

MDCD_INTERMEDIATE_CARE_MOS 

LABEL: Medicaid — Intermediate level of Care for LTSS Months 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the number of months during the year where the beneficiary’s Medicaid monthly Long-
Term Services and Supports (LTSS) Level of Care Code indicated that intermediate care was required to 
meet a beneficiary's needs. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS DE file (derived) 

VALUES: 0–12, or
